---
name: Device report (works / doesn't work on my device)
about: Confirm Vocare on a device the maintainer hasn't tested
title: "Device report: <your device + KOReader version>"
labels: ["needs-triage", "device-report"]
---

The README and release notes list devices that *should* work but haven't been personally tested by the maintainer (jailbroken Kindle, PocketBook, Boox, Onyx, Android tablets running KOReader, Linux desktops, older Kobos). A confirmation report — positive or negative — is genuinely useful.

**Device**

- Make + model:
- KOReader version (Settings → More tools → System statistics → KOReader version):
- How you got the `.sdr` files onto your Mac (USB, AirDrop, cloud sync, etc.):

**What worked**

- [ ] Vocare detected the books in the chosen folder
- [ ] Highlights appeared in the book detail panel
- [ ] Auto / manual mode processed cards end-to-end
- [ ] Cards landed in Anki

**What didn't work / oddities**

(Anything weird — empty highlight list, mis-counted highlights, missing chapter info, etc.)

**Anything else useful to other users on the same device**

(Tips for getting the workflow set up, gotchas, etc.)

---

*A verified device report counts as an accepted contribution under the [Rewards Program](https://github.com/MestreShao-Studios/vocare#helping-out) — earns v2.0 free for life.*
